description_long: This object is a set of six screwdrivers, each featuring a robust, contoured handle in a two-tone color scheme of red and yellow. The handles are ergonomically shaped with a flared base and a flattened top, likely designed for comfortable grip and torque application. Each handle has a hole near the top, possibly for hanging or storage. The shafts are straight and slender, colored red, and terminate in dark, pointed tips, suggesting precision work. The screwdrivers vary in length, with some being longer for deeper reach and others shorter for tighter spaces. The overall appearance is clean and new, with no visible branding or signs of wear.
description: A set of six red and yellow screwdrivers with contoured handles and pointed tips, varying in length and appearing new.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing all six screwdrivers side by side, highlighting the contoured handles and varying shaft lengths.
description_view_1: Side view showing the screwdrivers aligned in a row, emphasizing the uniformity of the handles and the thinness of the shafts.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the handles and the alignment of the screwdriver tips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handles' contours and the straight alignment of the shafts.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, plastic, ergonomic, two-tone with flared base and flattened top
